diagnosis: FOXAI WebUI routes explicit Engineer requests to EngineerAgent.analyze(). V1.2 therefore intercepts only explicit 'workshop' commands inside analyze, without modifying the WebUI or model runtime.

argv:
from core.engineer_agent import EngineerAgent
class ProbeApp:
    models=[]
    threads=8
agent=EngineerAgent(ProbeApp())
agent._active_airlock_context={'actor':'operator','authorization_allowed':True}
report=agent.analyze('/engineer workshop capabilities')
assert report.startswith('ENGINEERING WORKSHOP CAPABILITIES'), report[:800]
print('WORKSHOP_ANALYZE_ROUTE_OK')
